description: Create a URL monitor in ManageEngine OpManager to check the availability of the OpManager web interface itself. The application is already open and logged in on the dashboard (credentials: admin/Admin@123 if re-login is needed). Navigate to Monitors > URL Monitors section, and add a new URL monitor with the name 'OpManager Self-Check' targeting URL http://localhost:8060 with a polling interval of 5 minutes. This will create a real self-monitoring check for the OpManager service.
